Question: What is the combined total of intraoperative serum anion gap measurements recorded for patients who underwent a same-day outpatient ear, nose, and throat surgery with low-intensity continuous blood pressure support and severe bleeding causing organ dysfunction; immediate trauma abdominal surgery patients with moderate systemic illness needing occasional vasopressor boluses and minor bleeding controlled by pressure and brief cautery; emergency elective laparoscopic procedures in mildly ill patients requiring switching between catecholamines due to drug tolerance with persistent bleeding needing embolization; and elective neurosurgical cranial operations in patients with currently unclear physical status who required aggressive multi-drug vasoactive support after surgery complicated by bleeding necessitating a return to the operating room?
SQL Query: SELECT SUM(IntraopSerumAnionGap) AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM (SELECT IntraopSerumAnionGap AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM PerioperativePhysiologyRegistry WHERE ProcedureEpisodeID = "OR-2026-00049 ambulatory ENT procedure same-day" AND ASAClassification = "ASA unknown — adjudicated postoperative classification pending" AND PeriopVasoactiveTier = "Continuous low-intensity vasopressor infusion with minimal escalation" AND HemostasisComplicationGrade = "Bleeding resulting in end-organ hypoperfusion requiring intervention" UNION ALL SELECT IntraopSerumAnionGap AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM PerioperativePhysiologyRegistry WHERE ProcedureEpisodeID = "OR-2026-00048 trauma laparotomy immediate" AND ASAClassification = "ASA 3 — severe systemic disease with measurable activity restriction" AND PeriopVasoactiveTier = "Intermittent bolus vasopressor use only" AND HemostasisComplicationGrade = "Minimal oozing controlled by pressure and short-duration cautery" UNION ALL SELECT IntraopSerumAnionGap AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM PerioperativePhysiologyRegistry WHERE ProcedureEpisodeID = "OR-2026-00041 elective laparoscopy index case" AND ASAClassification = "ASA 2E — mild systemic disease presenting in emergency context" AND PeriopVasoactiveTier = "Requirement for catecholamine rotation due to tachyphylaxis" AND HemostasisComplicationGrade = "Persistent bleeding despite measures leading to angioembolization" UNION ALL SELECT IntraopSerumAnionGap AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM PerioperativePhysiologyRegistry WHERE ProcedureEpisodeID = "OR-2026-00047 neurosurgical elective craniotomy" AND ASAClassification = "ASA unknown — adjudicated postoperative classification pending" AND PeriopVasoactiveTier = "Rescue escalation with multi-agent vasoactive cocktail" AND HemostasisComplicationGrade = "Postoperative bleeding requiring return to theatre for hemostasis");

Question: What is the total sum of peak plasma elimination rates (PeakPlasmaEliminationRate) for: (1) participants in cohort-003 (elderly nosocomial surveillance subset) with the metabolic encephalopathy phenotype associated with hepatic dysfunction, an immuno-serologic profile of "neutralizing antibody plateau with functional ADCC effector readout", and treated with "mTOR pathway inhibitor used in transplant immunosuppression protocols"; (2) participants in cohort-004 (pregnant perinatal screening arm) with the community-acquired lower respiratory tract infection phenotype with hypoxemia, an immuno-serologic profile of "polyclonal hypergammaglobulinemia with complement consumption pattern", and treated with "bactericidal beta-lactam combination with extended-spectrum activity"; (3) participants in cohort-004 (pregnant perinatal screening arm) with the relapsing-remitting demyelinating phenotype with optic neuritis, an immuno-serologic profile of "seroreversion trajectory with waning binding and absent memory B cell signal", and treated with "small-molecule kinase inhibitor class with multikinase activity"; and (4) participants in cohort-008 (pharmacovigilance spontaneous report subset) with the acute febrile neutrophilic dermatosis phenotype suspected autoimmune, an immuno-serologic profile of "cross-reactive low-affinity IgA mucosal-dominant profile", and treated with "humanized monoclonal antibody targeting cytokine receptor subunit"?
SQL Query: SELECT SUM(PeakPlasmaEliminationRate) AS PeakPlasmaEliminationRate FROM (SELECT PeakPlasmaEliminationRate AS PeakPlasmaEliminationRate FROM PharmacokineticCohortMatrix WHERE ImmunoSerologicProfile = "neutralizing antibody plateau with functional ADCC effector readout" AND TherapeuticClassDescriptor = "mTOR pathway inhibitor used in transplant immunosuppression protocols" pattern" AND TherapeuticClassDescriptor = "bactericidal beta-lactam combination with extended-spectrum activity" UNION ALL SELECT PeakPlasmaEliminationRate AS PeakPlasmaEliminationRate FROM PharmacokineticCohortMatrix WHERE ParticipantCohortNumber = "cohort-004 pregnant perinatal screening arm" AND DiagnosticPhenomeLabel = "relapsing-remitting demyelinating phenotype with optic neuritis" AND ImmunoSerologicProfile = "seroreversion trajectory with waning binding and absent memory B cell signal" AND TherapeuticClassDescriptor = "small-molecule kinase inhibitor class with multikinase
